title: helonias orientalis
intro: Helonias orientalis, also known as golden colic root, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Melanthiaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which help to alleviate digestive issues such as colic and irritable bowel syndrome. The health benefits of Helonias orientalis include relief from stomach pain, bloating, and gas, as well as its potential to support immune function and reduce inflammation in the body. In herbal preparations, Helonias orientalis is often combined with other herbs to create teas, tinctures, and capsules that can be used to address various health concerns.
